name: Blade Thrower Master
description: The Blade Thrower Master is a deadly, agile fighter who excels at ranged combat. With an unmatched mastery of blades, they can strike from long distances with precision. Combining speed, accuracy, and stealth, the Blade Thrower Master dominates the battlefield, picking off enemies with swift, lethal throws. Web Dev https://www.crazygamesfree.com/
